---
title: "100 Year Rollinng (and filled)"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# 1. Load Required Libraries

```{r,message=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(DBI)
  library(RMariaDB)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(lubridate)
  library(zoo)
  library(pracma)
})
```

# 2. Configuration

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
mysql_host <- "localhost"
mysql_user <- "root"
mysql_pass <- "dJj135790"
mysql_port <- 3333
mysql_db   <- "silso"

## Connect to MySQL
con <- dbConnect(
  RMariaDB::MariaDB(),
  host = mysql_host,
  user = mysql_user,
  password = mysql_pass,
  port = mysql_port,
  dbname = mysql_db
)
```

## Grab 100 Rolling Table: Daily ISN

```{r}
rolling <- tbl(con, "daily_rolling_100yr") |> collect()
rolling <- rolling %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    sn = if_else(sn == 0, NA_real_, sn),
    sn = zoo::na.locf(sn, na.rm = FALSE)
  )

```

## Grab 100 Rolling Table: N/S Hempishere ISN

```{r}
hempis_filled <- tbl(con, "hemisphere") |> collect()
hempis_filled <- hempis_filled  %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(across(c(sn_tot, sn_n, sn_s), ~ if_else(.x == 0, NA_real_, .x))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(sn_tot, sn_n, sn_s), ~ zoo::na.locf(.x, na.rm = FALSE)))

```
